wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Royal Poison|2}}{{R|Royal Poison||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from {{E|The Round Tea Party|2}}.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from {{E|The Round Tea Party|2}} by selecting the {{Frame|Enjoy Your Tea}} option. 

== Interactions ==
*'''Royal Poison''''s HP loss triggers {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}}.
*'''Royal Poison''''s HP loss triggers {{R|Self-Forming Clay||2}}.
*{{R|Tungsten Rod||2}} reduces '''Royal Poison''''s HP loss by 1.
*{{R|Demon Tongue||2}} can reverses '''Royal Poison''''s HP loss.
**Because {{R|Demon Tongue||2}} ''heals'' HP rather than prevents HP loss, it does ''not'' negate any of the other triggers listed above.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Royal Poison to the game.
